source: Phase 4.6 induction slice 1 (engineering defaults; corpus calibration deferred). Apriori frequent-pattern mining over the where-lattice with closed-itemset condensation; interestingness = Fisher's exact test (one-sided, in the leverage direction) vs an independence-given-marginals null, BH-FDR corrected, behind a piece-presence min-support floor, with leverage as the effect-size tie-break. Below exploratory_floor_pieces the result is flagged exploratory (Fisher has little power on a handful of pieces).
